trade.summary: Modest bilateral trade. Brasile exports agricultural products, iron ore, and chemicals to Israele. Israele exports medical equipment, high-tech products, and agricultural technology. Trade has been impacted by political tensions.

diplomatic.summary: Relations deteriorated sharply following the October 7, 2023 Hamas attack and Israelei military campaign in Gaza. Brasile recalled its ambassador to Israele in 2024 and President Lula made controversial comparisons of the Gaza campaign to the Holocaust. Brasile has been vocal in demanding a ceasefire.
recent_incidents: Lula's Holocaust comparison remarks caused major diplomatic row
Brasile supports ICJ case against Israele

military.summary: Previously Israele supplied drones and surveillance technology to Brasile. Military cooperation has cooled significantly since 2023. Brasile suspended some defense-related contacts.

financial.summary: Brasileian-Jewish business community maintains some commercial links. Israelei tech companies have some Brasileian market presence. Overall financial ties are limited.

energy.summary: Very limited energy trade. Some Israelei involvement in agricultural technology that can reduce energy inputs.

scientific.summary: Scientific cooperation continues despite political tensions. Joint research in agrotechnology, medicine, and computer science. Israelei AgTech companies have partnerships with EMBRAPA.
